## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Karine Bengualid for the Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role combines project management/client coordination and technical coordination with engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI-driven platform (7 weeks old) for content production; role involves improving workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Karine has extensive freelance content marketing experience, especially in B2B SaaS and e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [High output expectation: 3-5 clients, 50+ content pieces/week through AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [Two key aspects: project management/coordination and technical coordination with engineering](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Part of a pod system: Content Manager, Technical Managing Editor, Director/Strategic Account Manager](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Manage content workflows, provide editorial oversight, and improve AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [High output: 3-5 clients, generating 50+ content pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Expectation to complete AI-assisted exercises in under an hour](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Karine's Background and Experience

  - [Started as marketing generalist, specialized in B2B SaaS and e-commerce content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Freelance experience: editing, strategy, writing, content management](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Client management: 1-7 clients simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Project management tools: Airtable, ClickUp, Monday, Trello, Asana](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [AI tools: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Unbounce Smart Copy](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Other tools: ClearScope, Ahrefs, SimilarWeb, Hotjar, Grammarly, Hemingway, Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### AI Integration in Workflow

  - [Uses AI for ideation: headlines, subheads, topics, keyword angles](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Research first, then AI as a "sounding board" for brainstorming](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Doesn't use direct AI output; combines ideas from multiple suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Used ChatGPT for the assignment: brand voice, personas, article rewriting](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Client Project Example: Talkspace B2B Blog Launch

  - [Coordinated with multiple stakeholders: marketing manager, account managers, design group, SMEs](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Developed strategy based on stakeholder input and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Created content strategy, pitched ideas, conducted interviews with SMEs](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
  - [Resulted in $70,000 monthly traction and improved sales support](https://fathom.video/share/-jt431XuxxtvYkHCoiY5Mc4jkoFK22u1?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

## Next Steps

  - Andi to review Karine's qualifications and experience against role requirements
  - Evaluate Karine's ability to manage high-volume content production through AI workflows
  - Consider Karine's client management and technical coordination capabilities
  - Assess Karine's potential to improve existing AI-driven content processes
